last_comments: Added red-spec coverage for the intended single-node local truth: config tests now pin local and dev defaults to a future `single-node` profile with colocated web/worker/scheduler semantics, and runtimeplan tests pin the matching normalized plan for the SQLite/Otter/Backlite/inproc adapter set. Updated roadmap and known-gaps docs to record the current `server-db` label mismatch and the intended follow-up.
